summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by refactoring App.tsx so that showAuthPrompt() always resets the dismissed state before showing the bar, and the dismissed state is only set when the user explicitly clicks dismiss. The auto-hide on authentication also resets both states. This covers all four acceptance criteria: no stale dismissed state, re-triggering resets dismissal, dismissed only set by explicit user action, and no persistence across sessions (state is in-memory React state).
